backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Product and UserProfile types with CRUD operations, access control using MixinAuthorization, admin-only product management, and public product queries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three completed features for rebranding 'Fashion Pin' to 'Fashion Forum' across Layout.tsx, index.html, and ProfileSetup.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-line summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files for the Fashion Forum e-commerce application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, page title 'Fashion Forum', root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component using TanStack Router with routes for product browsing, product details, and admin panel, plus conditional ProfileSetup modal for authenticated users without profiles.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying a shield alert icon, error message for non-admin users, and a button to return to the products page.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Category filter component rendering an 'All' button and dynamic category buttons with active state styling using rounded-full design.
frontend/src/components/CategoryImageSec: Collapsible category section with a clickable thumbnail that toggles a grid of 7 product images with hover effects and smooth animations.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header showing 'Fashion Forum' branding, authentication controls, admin link for authorized users, and footer with copyright and Caffeine attribution link.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product card with image, name, category badge, price, and optional Pinterest pin indicator; links to product detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing products with validation for name, description, price, category, image URL, and optional Pinterest pin ID.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name before accessing the application; prevents dismissal until completed.
frontend/src/components/SwipeableGallery: Image gallery with swipe/drag navigation, thumbnail indicators, image counter, and external link button to Meesho; includes promotional image link.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handles admin token initialization, and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profiles, products CRUD operations, and admin status checks with toast notifications for success/error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeGesture.ts: Custom hook that detects swipe gestures on touch and mouse events with configurable threshold and left/right swipe callbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display and Inter), Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm neutral color palette with light/dark mode support for a fashion e-commerce site.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProducts.tsx: Admin page for managing products with CRUD operations (add, edit, delete), featuring a table view, modal forms, and access control that shows AccessDeniedScreen for non-admin users.
frontend/src/pages/ProductBrowse.tsx: Main product browsing page with hero banner, swipeable gallery, category filtering, promotional sections with external Meesho links, and a grid of product cards.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page that displays a single product with image, name, price, description, category badge, and optional Pinterest link, with navigation back to product browse.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, custom fonts (Inter and Playfair Display), animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking three completed features that renamed 'Fashion Pin' to 'Fashion Forum' across the application header, HTML title, and frontend codebase. The project is named 'Fashion Forum' with schema version 1.0.0 and project state version 3.
